Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Continued To Jul-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT FIAT GROWTH, INC., FIAT GROWTH, LLC, FIAT SERVICES, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT

No appearances In Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - CROSS DEFENDANTs FIAT GROWTH, INC., FIAT GROWTH, LLC,and FIAT SERVICES, LLC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT.

Cross-defendants Fiat Growth, Inc., Fiat Growth, LLC and Fiat Services LLC's' motion to strike the prayer for attorney's fees per Labor Code section 218.5 is granted with leave to amend.

"Any party, within the time allowed to respond to a pleading may serve and file a notice of motion to strike the whole or any part thereof," (CCP section 435.) "The court may, upon a motion made pursuant to Section 435, or at any time in its discretion, and upon terms it deems proper: [para] (a) Strike out any irrelevant, false, or improper matter inserted in any pleading. (b) Strike out all or any part of any pleading not drawn or filed in conformity with the laws of this state, a court rule, or an order of the court." (CCP section 436.) "In the construction of a pleading, for the purpose of determining its effect, its allegations must be liberally construed, with a view to substantial justice between the parties." (CCP section 452.)

(see word minutes for full details).

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Text Ruling

1 - CROSS DEFENDANTs FIAT GROWTH, INC., FIAT GROWTH, LLC,and FIAT SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Cross-defendants Fiat Growth, Inc., Fiat Growth, LLC and Fiat Services LLC's demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
